entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS THIS EVENING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
MUCH COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST 15 TO 20 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
